---
name: create-user-story
description: Create a user story and acceptance criteria for a requested feature.
---

# Create User Story Prompt

Please write a clear, concise user story using the following format:

- Title: <short title>
- User Story: As a <role>, I want <goal> so that <benefit>.
- Acceptance Criteria:
  1. <criteria>
  2. <criteria>
  3. <criteria>

Note: If this user story affects both Client and Server, create a GitHub Issue for the Server side and reference it from this story. For Client-only stories, Handoff inside Client project is acceptable but must be recorded in `docs/requirements/productbacklogs/client-product-backlog.md` within 24 hours.

Use product requirements and quality attributes from `requirements-guideline`.
